Holdout-Promotion Bake-off — Decision Simulator

#2555 · the 4-clause rule that decides whether a challenger skill replaces the champion. playground

Bake-off inputs

rubric composite.min_pass = 5.5 — NOT consulted (lock wins)

Decision

PROMOTE
The LOCK's min_pass (7.0) is the authoritative composite gate, deliberately stricter than the rubric's day-to-day 5.5 floor. A challenger that clears the rubric's bar can still fail the sealed holdout bar — that's the anti-gaming point. The harness fix in this PR makes the lock win (it previously let the rubric override).
Scenario — copy back into Claude

  


  
self-contained · live · mirrors run-skill-eval.sh --holdout-promote decision rule
